title: SFM Spies Like You (collab part)
description:
no bgm
watch the collab here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zlw8jVQmi6M

thought it'd be funny if my part for the collab was still tf2-based like the original so i used sfm videos and a couple gmod ones as well. referenced the og ytpmv's visuals and hid a bunch of shit in too. anyway i'm really happy with how the second half turned out
